description: A legacy shortcode plugin was recently deactivated, leaving broken shortcodes exposed on the site. In the WordPress admin panel, replace the legacy shortcodes in three specific posts with native Gutenberg blocks. In the post 'Service Interruption Notice', replace `[legacy_alert]Our servers will be down for maintenance on Sunday.[/legacy_alert]` with a native 'Quote' block containing the text 'Our servers will be down for maintenance on Sunday.' In 'Watch our latest webinar', replace `[legacy_video id="jNQXAC9IVRw"]` with a 'YouTube Embed' block using the URL `https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jNQXAC9IVRw`. In 'Annual Report 2025', replace `[legacy_button url="/annual-report-pdf" label="Download Report"]` with a 'Buttons' block containing a single button with the text 'Download Report' and the URL '/annual-report-pdf'. Ensure all legacy shortcode text is completely removed and the posts are updated.

metadata.post1_expected_text: Our servers will be down for maintenance on Sunday.
